question_text: Let 𝑋1, 𝑋2, … , 𝑋𝑛 (𝑛≥2) be a random sample from the following probability

options.A: nd 𝜇̂ denote the maximum likelihood estimator of 𝜇, whenever it exists. Then which of the following statements is/are correct?
